title: Sautéed Apples
ingredients: 4 large Granny Smith Apples, peeled, cored and sliced ¼” thick
instructions:
In a large skillet melt the butter over medium heat and add the apples. Cook until the apples are almost tender, stirring constantly.
Dissolve the cornstarch in the water and add to the skillet. Add the brown sugar and cinnamon and stir. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove from the heat and serve warm.
Great side to pork dishes.
